name: Archbee Documentation Platform API
what_it_does: Developer documentation and knowledge base platform with REST API — providing structured documentation spaces, API reference generation from OpenAPI specs, code snippet support, team wikis, custom domains, versioning, and AI-powered search for technical teams creating developer docs, internal wikis, and knowledge bases.
use_cases: Managing documentation content programmatically via Archbee API for automated publishing
Integrating documentation with development workflows via Git sync and GitHub integration
Querying documentation search analytics to understand what content users are looking for
Automating API reference generation from OpenAPI specs in CI/CD pipeline
Managing team knowledge base structure and access permissions programmatically
not_for: Customer support knowledge base with ticketing integration (use Zendesk Guide)
Interactive API playground beyond static docs (use ReadMe for interactive developer experience)
Marketing content and website CMS (use Contentful or Webflow)
best_when: A developer-focused team wants a clean, structured documentation platform for developer docs, API references, and internal wikis with code-first features and Git sync without the complexity of enterprise documentation suites.
avoid_when: You need deep customer support ticketing integration, interactive API sandboxes, or marketing website CMS — Archbee focuses on technical documentation.

auth.notes: API key from Archbee account settings. Bearer token auth. Workspace-scoped access. No webhooks. GitHub integration for Git sync configured in admin. Slack integration for notifications. No OAuth2.

pricing.notes: Romanian company (Bucharest). Founded 2020. Raised $2M+. Developer-focused documentation differentiator — OpenAPI spec import for API reference, code blocks with syntax highlighting, custom domains on all paid plans. Git sync with GitHub for version control. AI search powered by OpenAI. Competitive pricing vs Notion or GitBook. Popular with developer tools companies.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for pages, collections, spaces, and members. Bearer token auth. Good documentation. Content creation and management via API. No webhooks limits automation reactive patterns. GitHub Git sync configured in admin. OpenAPI import for API reference is admin-configured.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Page reads idempotent. Collection reads idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent. Page creation not idempotent — check for existing before creating.
known_agent_gotchas: No webhooks — must poll for documentation change events
GitHub Git sync configured in admin — not API-driven setup
OpenAPI spec import is admin-configured — not programmatic via REST API
Small team (Romanian startup) — verify API support responsiveness
Free tier 3 member limit — insufficient for most growing teams

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. EU and US data residency. Bearer token auth. Documentation content may include proprietary technical details — restrict API access. Romanian company with EU data protection standards. GitHub integration requires careful repo permission scoping.
